abilities.description: CARDNAME gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If you control creatures named Mine Worker and Tower Worker, put two +1/+1 counters on CARDNAME instead. Activate only once each turn.

effect.description: CARDNAME gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If you control creatures named Mine Worker and Tower Worker, put two +1/+1 counters on CARDNAME instead. Activate only once each turn.
effect.name: Branch
